text: Natural Language Processing, or NLP, is a branch of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It allows machines to read, interpret, and even translate text between different languages. For example, NLP powers sentiment analysis, where a computer can determine whether a review is positive or negative based on its words. You might also encounter NLP when using chatbots, which are designed to understand your questions and provide helpful answers automatically. From simple spell-checkers to complex translation tools, NLP is transforming how we interact with technology, making it easier for us to communicate in our own natural languages.
